text.title: Supply Chain Risk Checklist Spike Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Supply Chain Risk Checklist Spike end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: fetch-signals
step.action: Pull data from osv.dev (CVE), registry (downloads, last release), GitHub (stars, maintainer count), SBOM (transitive depth).
step.decision-gate: Reject if any signal not retrievable; reject stale data >24h.

step.name: score-signals
step.action: Map each signal to 0-3 per rubric in 01-core-rules.

step.name: remediation-and-decay
step.action: Pick remediation (adopt / pin-and-monitor / fork / replace / decline); set decay_date.
